exact_confirmation_reminders.reminder: Before submission, require the user to state the exact permit application action, target application, and that they are ready to submit in the attended DevHub session.
Before upload, require the user to identify the exact file, target application or permit number, and upload control in the attended DevHub session.
Before payment, require the user to confirm the exact fee, payment method handling, and final payment action in the attended DevHub session.
Before scheduling or cancellation, require the user to confirm the exact permit, inspection type, date or cancellation target, and official action.
